sections.paragraph: m. pr. the light or sunny region (from the root דָּרַר No. 2 for דָּרַֹּום), hence the south quarter (opp. to צָפֹון the region covered with darkness; comp. in Homer, πρὸς Ἠῶ τʼ Ἠελιόν τε and πρὸς ζόφον). Eze 40:24, seq; 42:12 , seq.; Ecc 1:6. Poetically used of the south wind, Job 37:17.
